# Agentforce and Generative AI Reference (Einstein GenAI References)

## Main Heading
"Agentforce and Generative AI Reference"

## API and SDK References Listed

1. **Agent API Reference** - Enables communication with AI agents in your org via connected apps and tokens
2. **Agentforce Python SDK Reference** - Programmatic agent and prompt template creation using Salesforce Metadata API
3. **Agent Script Reference** - Language combining natural language with programmatic expressions for agent workflows
4. **Agentforce DX Reference** - Pro-code tools for agent creation and testing outside Builder UI
5. **Agentforce Mobile SDK Reference** - Native iOS and Android integration for conversational AI
6. **Lightning Types Reference** - Custom types for improving agent action interfaces
7. **Models API** - Apex classes and REST endpoints connecting to large language models (two references: Apex and REST)
8. **Testing API Reference** - Combines Metadata and Connect API endpoints for agent testing
9. **Citations Reference** - Apex classes for programmatically adding citations to agent responses
10. **Metadata Types** - Agentforce functionality via Metadata API
11. **Tooling Objects** - Agentforce functionality via Tooling API

## Developer Guides Referenced
- Agentforce Developer Guide
- Agent API Developer Guide
- Models API Developer Guide

## Last Fetched
2026-04-05 - No changes detected from previous fetch.
